Bug reports (6)

Cross-cutting issues detected automatically from current data + co-located batch logs.

B1-GEOmediumGEO: 7 of 120 batch URLs (6%) — n8n exec succeeded but no www_perception row written

These URLs were triggered through the brand-perception-www webhook (workflow 52lZstOsQMhgspl8) and n8n marked the execution successful, but the final DB insert never landed. Likely a conditional branch in the workflow that bypasses the Supabase upsert under some condition — or a slug collision in the upsert (two URL variants resolving to the same slug). At >30% loss this becomes critical and the batch should not be trusted as complete.

sample missing URLs (first 25)
  • https://brandlight.ai/
  • https://chatgptrank.com/
  • https://getaimonitor.com/
  • https://rankshift.com/
  • https://www.aeo.com/
  • https://www.aeoradar.com/
  • https://www.surferseo.com/grow-flow/

B1-henkelhighhenkel: 4 of 7 batch URLs (57%) — n8n exec succeeded but no www_perception row written

These URLs were triggered through the brand-perception-www webhook (workflow 52lZstOsQMhgspl8) and n8n marked the execution successful, but the final DB insert never landed. Likely a conditional branch in the workflow that bypasses the Supabase upsert under some condition — or a slug collision in the upsert (two URL variants resolving to the same slug). At >30% loss this becomes critical and the batch should not be trusted as complete.

sample missing URLs (first 25)

  • https://www.loctiteproducts.com/ideas.html
B2medium16 runs with brand-name extraction failure (page title returned as brand)

The workflow's Extract Brand Name node returned the page's "Home" label in the page's native language instead of the actual brand name. Fix: harden brand extraction with og:site_name fallback and a foreign-language home-label blocklist.

sample affected runs (first 20)

B3medium1 LLM call(s) with non-ok parse_status

These calls returned but failed schema validation. Usually means the model emitted invalid JSON or hit token cap mid-output.

sample (first 25)
  • slug=gemini.pl · exec_id=2026051822362618976600 · call=17M · parse_status=markdown_sections
B5highPer-row cost is UNDERSTATED — GEO call _usage/_model stripped on 1516 www_perception rows (~$22.74 undercount in scoreboard)

The brand-perception-www webhook writes ONLY the parsed analysis JSON into Supabase www_perception.geo_evaluation — stripping the BytePlus envelope (_usage, _model) that HI and 5T columns preserve. Cost calc therefore counts HI + 5T only and misses the GEO call entirely. Fix in n8n: have the "AI GEO (BytePlus)" Set node (or the Supabase upsert) preserve _usage + _model alongside the parsed payload, matching the shape used for hi_evaluation and 5_truth.

sample affected rows (first 20)
  • slug=morele.net · url=https://www.morele.net/
  • slug=dietly.pl · url=https://www.dietly.pl/
  • slug=payu.pl · url=https://www.payu.pl/
  • slug=bnpparibas.pl · url=https://www.bnpparibas.pl/
